top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} returns 500 instead of 404 for a missing book
top_findings.evidence: src/repository.rs:71 get_book_by_id uses .fetch_one() -> sqlx::Error::RowNotFound on absent id; converted via #[from] into AppError::Database (src/lib.rs:9) -> 500 (src/lib.rs:19). AppError::NotFound->404 exists but is never used by the get-by-id path. Repair agent never ran (_agent_stdout.log 'API call failed after 3 retries'), so the flagged defect was not fixed.
top_findings.suggestion: Use .fetch_optional() and map None to AppError::NotFound in get_book_by_id (and update_book).

top_findings.title: Inappropriate 500 status code for a missing resource on GET/PUT by id
top_findings.evidence: GET /books/{id} (src/api.rs:31) and PUT /books/{id} (src/api.rs:70) return 500 for a missing id via fetch_one -> RowNotFound -> AppError::Database -> 500 (src/lib.rs:19); a missing resource should be 404.
top_findings.suggestion: Map RowNotFound to AppError::NotFound in the repository.
